# Preface {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the electrophysiology course (TODO: name).

TODO: [think of a cool course name](https://github.com/neuroinformatics-unit/course-ephys-osss/issues/2)

This course will cover the full electrophysiology processing pipeline,
from start to finish. This includes 

- data preprocessing
- spike sorting,
- postproicessng and quality assessment
- integration with behavioural data.

Give overview and link to pages
Explain the Concept Notes (internal links where concepts are expanded, indicated with the 💡 emoji) 
link to github: https://github.com/neuroinformatics-unit/course-ephys-osss

## Funding and Ackowledgements


- Wellcome Trust, Gatsby
- Funders for those who contributed materials?
- Niko
